message:
chore: register 15 new modules in lib.rs and update bead issue assignments

Add pub mod declarations for all new modules: aot_entrygraph_compiler,
benchmark_evidence_bundle, bounded_regret_safety_case,
certified_optimization_governance, cold_start_aot_governance,
react_compile_verification, react_doctor_preflight, react_lane_inference,
react_mismatch_catalog, react_ssr_verification, render_lane_specializer,
shipped_path_matrix, supremacy_evidence_bundle, supremacy_verdict_engine,
and zero_placeholder_gate. Enable #![feature(int_roundings)] for nightly
integer rounding methods.

Update bead issue tracker: assign issues to owners (PearlTower,
PearlBeacon, TopazHarbor) and refresh timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
